summary: Closed vacuum as finite feedback cavity: Z = Tr e^{-βΔ} det(I-zR)^{-1}; P = β^{-1} ∂_V log Z; P V = T χ with χ = V ∂_V log Z; matter = terminally stabilized feedback eigenmodes; S_DE roots as Tr/det of 2-mode feedback pressure sector; DESI fail requires boundary ∂_V R correction, not root refit.
